description.ko: 심해의 가장 깊은 곳을 탐험하는 비전 있는 프로젝트로, 미지의 구역에서 생물 발광의 기적을 발견하는 AQUA-5 잠수정의 여정을 담고 있습니다.
description.en: A visionary exploration into the deepest parts of the ocean, featuring the AQUA-5 submersible as it discovers bioluminescent wonders in the midnight zone.

prompt: A futuristic deep-sea exploration vessel named AQUA-5 navigating through a dark, abyssal trench. The scene features glowing bioluminescent jellyfish and coral, intense blue and teal lighting, high-tech submarine hull with portholes, floating particles in the water, cinematic composition, photorealistic, 8k resolution.
